task_description: list all directories that contain more than 50 files
code: find . -type d -exec sh -c 'echo "$(find "{}" -type f | wc -l) {}"' \; | sort -nr | head -20

- confirm or eliminate possible directions

you may combine related actions when they belong together naturally.  
avoid overly small steps that reveal nothing.

task description:

task description: list all directories that contain more than 50 files

```bash
find . -type d -exec sh -c 'echo "$(find "{}" -type f | wc -l) {}"' \; | awk '$1 > 50 {print $2}'
```
